title: DIYASY 10 Pack Christmas Pull-Back Cars, Mini Christmas Racing Vehicles for Christmas Cracker Fillers, Stocking Stuffers & Party Favors
features: Christmassy Design: These small pullback cars feature adorable Christmas elements such as Santa Claus, Snowman, Christmas Tree, round Reindeer, their cute appearances will capture children’s attention and bring them lots of fun during Christmas.

Quantity: You will get 10 PCS Christmas pull-back cars, which are designed in 3 shapes: Santa × 2, Snowman × 2, Christmas Tree × 2 and round shapes × 4, a thoughtful combination that can meet different children's preferences and needs.

Product Size & Quality: Our Christmas toy cars measure approximate 5 × 5 × 5 cm, its handy size makes them super easy to grip and control, and they are made of hard plastic which are not afraid of falling or crashing, provide with longtime use.

Easy to Play with: Just press the cars and pull back, then release to make them rush. You can either enjoy racing with the family to see who wins, or make several cars to crash at each other, having an unforgettable happy time with closed ones.

Christmas Application: These racing cars can make perfect Christmas stocking fillers, Xmas crackers gifts, party favors, Christmas treat for kids, bring endless happiness on birthday, , anniversary, celebration and etc.
description: Product Description Pull back, release and go! Kids Christmas Toys Christmas Stocking Fillers Christmas Party Favors
